assessment.note: He can do the tasks but is second-guessing whether his approach matches team expectations, suggesting mild drag from uncertainty while still showing basic engagement; also reveals a strong off-signature clarity concern.

new_queue.label: Team expectations
new_queue.name: When you second-guess your approach, what expectations feel hardest to read?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific expectation gap he just named so the manager can remove ambiguity quickly.

new_queue.label: Done means what
new_queue.name: What does 'done' mean to you on a ticket right now?
new_queue.description: Checks whether Sam has a usable internal bar for shipping and review.

new_queue.label: Handoff gaps
new_queue.name: Where are the handoffs still fuzzy for you?
new_queue.description: Finds the exact transition points where Sam is compensating or guessing.

new_queue.label: Waiting on
new_queue.name: What are you waiting on most often before you can move a ticket forward?
new_queue.description: Identifies hidden dependency points that slow him down.

new_queue.label: Go-to people
new_queue.name: Who have you found easiest to go to when you get stuck?
new_queue.description: Surfaces which relationships are already working and where support can be routed.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What support from me would help you move faster this fortnight?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete manager action for the next stretch of onboarding.
